column1: # S-FRAP1_dataset_summary: **Table S-FRAP1.** Summary of the 4 synthetic stacks and the 10 experimental FRAP stacks (top-5 quality-ranked per molecular-weight condition) used in the cross-domain validation. Synthetic stacks are generated by an explicit finite-difference solver in normalized coordinates; experimental stacks are taken from the public DeepFRAP dataset (Röding et al.
column2: 2020) and chosen by a five-metric quality screen across 40 candidates.
